creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from Beeblebrox <zaphod@berentweb.com> -----

Date: Wed, 25 Jul 2012 11:44:24 -0700 (PDT)
From: Beeblebrox <zaphod@berentweb.com>
To: freebsd-ports-bugs@freebsd.org
Subject: Re: ports/169366: www/xpi-* ports need re-install after each
	Firefox update

clutton <mbsd@isgroup.com.ua> wrote:
> For package it had already fixed.
> You can reinstall firefox from package and you doesn't need reinstall
> plugins.

> Î ~ â cat /var/db/pkg/firefox-13.0.1,1/+INSTALL | grep xpi cp
> -R /usr/local/lib/xpi/symlinks/firefox/ /usr/local/lib/firefox/extensions/
> > /dev/null 2>&1
>
> I test it with firefox-13.0.1,1. Did you install firefox from ports? 
Has the problem exist with fresh ports free: firefox-13.0.1,1?
******************************

Problem persists: I did Install from ports. Firefox ver is 13.0.1.1.
Problem DOES seem to be resolved for seamonkey v.2.9.1.

Regards.



--
